name: Pork Chops Dijon
recipeIngredient: 4 Pork loin chops, each 1/2 inch thick
recipeInstructions:
1. Trim excess fat from the pork chops.
2. Spray a 10-inch skillet with nonstick spray to coat.
3. Brown the chops on both sides in the hot skillet.
4. Remove the chops and add onions; cook and stir over medium heat for 3 minutes.
5. Push the onions aside, return the chops to the skillet.
6. Combine mustard, dressing, and pepper; spread evenly over the chops.
7. Cover; cook over medium-low heat for 15 minutes or until meat is tender.
